description: Capability for the standalone logs popout window. It listens for game-log / logs-load-instance events and drives its own custom titlebar (the window is undecorated to match the launcher chrome), so it needs the window controls the titlebar uses. The current_log_target and read_instance_log commands are app commands (registered via generate_handler) and are not gated by the ACL, so no permission is granted for them here. Deliberately excludes opener/updater/dialog/process/tray.
